title: ericoides laetum
intro: Ericoides laetum, also known as Wintergreen, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant contains methyl salicylate, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Ericoides laetum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating headaches and fever. Herbal preparations of Wintergreen, such as teas and infusions, have been traditionally used to alleviate these symptoms and promote overall well-being.
